core_skills: Full-stack development, Java, J2EE, REST APIs, JSON
skill_match_scores: Full-stack development:0.0, Java:1.0, J2EE:0.0, REST APIs:1.0, JSON:0.0
must_have_quals: 2+ years of software development experience, focusing on full-stack development, Hands on experience with Java/J2EE and building backend services using REST and JSON, Strong frontend experience with JavaScript and React.js, building responsive and user-friendly web applications, Experience designing and implementing scalable, distributed systems in production environments, Strong understanding of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure) and hands-on experience with cloud-based deployments
core_responsibilities: Design and develop end-to-end full-stack systems that are scalable, secure, and maintainable, ensuring seamless integration between frontend and backend components, Lead full-stack product development efforts, translating business objectives into technical solutions with a focus on SAAS architecture, user experience, and backend system performance, Develop and maintain frontend user interfaces using JavaScript and React.js, while ensuring backend services in Java/J2EE, REST APIs, and MongoDB are efficient and scalable, Ensure systems are compatible with DevOps processes, implementing best practices for CI/CD pipelines, logging, monitoring, and overall operational needs, Work independently and collaboratively on full-stack projects, delivering high-quality, scalable solutions in a fast-paced environment, Maintain operational excellence by reducing on-call volume, driving Root Cause Analysis (RCA) for full-stack systems, and fostering system-wide improvements, Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including product managers and designers, to ensure successful product delivery and alignment with business requirements
job_summary: Phenom is an AI-Powered talent experience platform that is redefining the HR tech space. They are looking for a Software Developer (Full-Stack) to design and develop scalable and secure backend services, ensuring operational excellence and innovative solutions across their platforms.
